InvalidEmail: The '{{field}}' field is not a valid email address.
StringLengthBetween: The '{{field}}' must be at least {{min}} and at max {{max}} characters long.
UsernameRegex: Invalid username format. Usernames must meet the following criteria: Begin with a letter or a digit. Can contain letters, digits, periods (.), or underscores (_). Cannot contain two consecutive periods (.) or underscores (_). End with a letter or a digit.
MaxLengthValidationError: The maximum length of field '{{field}}' must not be greater than {{max}} symbols.
MinLenghtValidationError: The minimum length of field '{{field}}' must not be less than {{min}} symbols.
FirstnameRegex: Invalid first name format. First name must meet the following criteria: Start with a capital letter (including Estonian characters: Ä, Ö, Ü, Õ, Š, Ž). Contain only lowercase letters after the first (ä, ö, ü, õ, š, ž, and Latin letters a–z). Can include a hyphen (`-`) or a space (` `), but not both together. Each part of the first name after a separator must start with a capital letter. No digits, special characters, or consecutive spaces/hyphens are allowed.
LastnameRegex: Invalid last name format. Last Name must meet the following criteria: Start with a capital letter (including Estonian characters: Ä, Ö, Ü, Õ, Š, Ž). Contain only lowercase letters after the first (ä, ö, ü, õ, š, ž, and Latin letters a–z). No hyphens, spaces, digits, or special characters are allowed.
BothDatesRequired: Please select both a start and an end date for the reservation.
ReservationToMustBeAfterFrom: The reservation end date must be after the start date.
